chunks.text: Yangqing Jia Experiences VP NVIDIA Building AI for system software and cloud services for AI. Founder and CEO Lepton AI (acquired by NVIDIA) Lepton is the new AI cloud and the only ClusterMax Gold platform across multiple clouds. VP Alibaba Group Scaling data analytics and AI product as President of Alibaba Cloud's Computing Platform. Head of System AI Lab, Damo Academy. Director of Engineering Facebook Initiated and built Facebook's general-purpose AI platform (backbone for ranking, CV, NLP). Co-lead of PyTorch 1.0. Created Caffe2 and ONNX. Research Scientist Google Brain Worked on computer vision, deep learning, and TensorFlow. Co-creator of GoogLeNet (Inception). Projects Lepton Search Fully open sourced demo of conversational search engine built with Lepton AI. Caffe / Caffe2 Creator. One of the first widely adopted deep learning frameworks. High-performance AI capability for mobile and cloud. PyTorch Co-lead of PyTorch 1.0. Unified research and production capabilities for deep learning. ONNX Co-creator. Open Neural Network Exchange standard. TensorFlow Contributor. Worked on the early design and implementation at Google Brain. Education UC Berkeley PhD, EECS Tsinghua University BS and MS, Control Science and Engineering
